definitions: To divide into two or more pieces with a knife or other sharp implement.
To make an opening or wound in (something) with a sharp-edged tool or object.
To reduce the size or amount of (something); to shorten.
To stop or discontinue (an action, activity, or supply).
examples: She will cut the cake into slices.
Be careful not to cut your finger.
The company decided to cut expenses.
He needs to cut down on sugar.
